name: @alignment/workflow-engine
description: Ceiling: deterministic cross-host workflow engine (TS). Floor stays src/runtime/buildloop.py. See docs/design/dynamic-workflows.md.

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types __tests__/run.ts && node --experimental-strip-types __tests__/slice2.ts && node --experimental-strip-types __tests__/slice3.ts && node --experimental-strip-types __tests__/slice4.ts && node --experimental-strip-types __tests__/slice5.ts && node --experimental-strip-types __tests__/slice6.ts && node --experimental-strip-types __tests__/slice7.ts

comment: optionalDependencies document the OPT-IN warm adapters; the default CLI adapters need none. They are NOT installed by the plugin — a user who wants a warm host runs `npm i` themselves.
